name: Shishou
description: __Species:__ Intelligent Weapon Master is the main protagonist of the Tensei Shitara Ken Deshita series and the main weapon of Fran. His personality is that of a father/guardian of sorts towards Fran, he takes care and protects her while also assisting her by providing his abilities and bonuses to Fran. name: Takezou Kurata
description: President of koto music club. He's shy and weak in difficult situations. After his failure at the exam, depressed, Takezou saw his senpai's performance, where she was giving her all even though no one listened and koto's string had been broken. He was deeply moved by her performance, so he joined the club. After senpai's graduation, he became an only member of koto music club and had to find strength to protect it.

name: Kai Ichinose
description: Kai Ichinose is a perfect student. He lives with his mother, Reiko Ichinose, in a forest. He is extremely talented with the piano but struggles to find his own sound. For years his sound was just the forest piano but now he is challenged with finding a new one.

name: Meme Kakure
description: **Type:** Self-Conscious **Occupation:** First-Year High School Student **Debut:** Chapter 45 **Girlfriend No. 011** Meme is extremely shy, to the point of wearing masks to hide her face in order to avoid drawing attention to herself. She strives to keep her face hidden no matter what. Meme also enjoys knitting, and spends time knitting a lot of little stuffed animals. name: Nagisa Misumi
description: Nagisa Misumi is the ace of the school lacrosse team. She is also a close friend of Akane, who has her own Takoyaki stand. Her alter ego, Cure Black, is the strong fighter of the Pretty Cure duo. She is the one with the strength and the heart. She is quite girly and image conscious, and has a large collection of stuffed animals. Nagisa is weak in academics but makes up for it with pure spirit and energy. She also has a large appetite and loves to eat chocolate and, according to Honoka, foods wit

name: Saigiku Jouno
description: Saigiku Jouno is a member of the Hunting Dogs. He possesses the ability "Priceless Tears".

name: Akito Shinonome
description: __Height:__ 174 cm (5'9") Shinonome Akito is a first-year student at Kamiyama High School. He is a member of the street music group Vivid BAD SQUAD. Akito has been a street musician since middle school. He looks up to Shiraishi An's father, who was a street musician as well and keeps on training to surpass them. He used to sing together with Toya under the name "BAD DOGS" before joining with An and Kohane to become Vivid BAD SQUAD. Akito appears to be an easy-going guy at first. However, his per

name: Brandish μ
description: Brandish μ is part of the Alvarez Empire as one of the Spriggan 12, the protection guard of Emperor Spriggan. She also leads her own team inside the Imperial Army, the Brandish Squad. Knowingly able to bring a nation to its knees, she garnered the epithet "Country Demolisher". (Source: Fairy Tail Wikia)

name: Hiroto Maehara
description: He is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. Maehara is a nice guy and in every sense of the word, a playboy. He has a "live the moment" attitude about life in general. He is one of the few that is popular in the whole school despite being in the E Class. Despite that attitude, he is a caring person and isn't the type to pick on someone weaker than him. He also falls into the type of being honest, and often reacts strongly to things.

name: Kaori Asaka
description: __Height:__ 149cm Cheery and energetic, she accidentally stumbled upon her classmate Shizuku's novel when she approached her. After borrowing the novel in order to read it, she has started take an admiration towards Shizuku and asks when her next novel will be. Distraught to know she wasn't planning to write another one, Kaori asks to go out together so she can be inspired to write a new story. Unbeknown to Shizuku, she knew her from elementary school. There's also something she's hiding from he

name: Lawless
description: __Height__: 176 cm Lawless is the Servamp of Greed and has a contract with a famous pianist Licht Jekylland Todoroki. He is a strong Servamp who often quotes Shakespeare and has a habit of killing his Eves once he grows bored of them. Lawless is self-centred and particularly emotional. name: Majima
description: A terrorist who attacked a subway station. ~!He was the one who blew up the radio tower prior to the events of the series, and had met young chisato during that time!~ ~!He, alongside Chisato is also a child of Alan!~ ~!In the last episode he is shown falling to his death, however shortly after it is revealed he survived!~

name: Nanashi
description: A ronin, haunted by his terrible past, has sworn to keep his sword sheathed. However upon meeting Kotaro he finds himself re-evaluating his life. Whilst traveling with the young Kotaro, Nanashi finds himself acting as a bodyguard for the boy. This in turn leads to his prolonged struggle against Raro.

However, his job is "Talker" which is regarded as the weakest. Knowing that, Noel worked hard persistently to fulfil his ambition. name: Rose
description: A Chimera who can copy the abilities of any monster she eats, just like K*rby. She treats the dying words of her elderly creator as gospel, resulting in....rather tacky lines.

name: Saki Yoshida
description: Saki is a friend-less, lonely girl who's looked down upon by the popular girls. However, when she starts attending a new school and changes her looks, her life takes a turn for the worse. ~! Saki Yoshida dies from a heroin overdose alone in the bathroom at the end of the manga after having a miscarriage. Before she dies, she has a dream where she's older, living a better life as a mom with one daughter. !~

name: Shou Suzuki
description: ~!Sho Suzuki is the son of the leader of Claw. He led a direct resistance against his father's world domination plan.!~

name: Tonari
description: __Affiliation:__ Tonari's Group (former) Tonari is a girl that Fushi meets on the island of Jananda. She has short brown hair, green eyes, and tan skin. She's seen wearing a blue jacket and shorts, a black and white shirt, and has a pet owl named Ligard. ~!Sometime after Fushi left the island of Jananda, Tonari began ingesting different types of poison to develop strong immunities to them.!~ (Source: To Your Eternity Wiki, edited)

name: Umiko Ahagon
description: __Birth Place:__ Okinawa Prefecture, Japan __Height:__ 162 cm A programmer who often gets annoyed when she has to fix errors and is embarrassed by her surname. She is a military fan and has several airsoft weapons in her workspace.

name: W
description: __Birthday:__ Claims to have forgotten __Place of Birth:__ Kazdel __Race:__ Sarkaz __Height:__ 165 cm W, Sarkaz mercenary leader. W's squad, having been involved in Kazdel's lengthy civil war, is infamous for their brutal and efficient combat methods. W clashed with Rhodes Island during the Chernobog incident, but after defecting from Reunion for unknown reasons, signed a strategic cooperation agreement with Rhodes Island after negotiating with Dr. Kal'tsit in person.

name: Akuma Shuudoushi
description: The Demon Cleric might seem like a gentle young man, but he is actually the demon in charge of the Demon Temple inside the Demon Castle. The Demon Cleric is usually the one called upon to use magic to resurrect anyone who happens to die in the Demon Castle.
mediaTitles: Sleepy Princess in the Demon Castle

name: Iku Sutou
description: __Type:__ Masochist __Occupations:__ First-Year High School Student, Baseball Club Member __Debut:__ Chapter 33 **Girlfriend No. 009** Iku loves baseball, to the point of spending hours recruiting for her team when it's on the verge of being disbanded. She is determined to do her best no matter what; because of this she's described as the embodiment of "stoicism" by Rentarou. Iku is also wildly masochistic, going so far as to train for hours until her body is in agony so she can enjoy the pain.
